steps.title: Focus on the requested example
steps.content: The notes define an isthmus and then name the Isthmus of Potidea in Greece. Since the student wants a specific example, the sentence must identify a named isthmus, not just define the term or mention a related geographic fact.

steps.title: Check the choice focus
steps.content: Choice A is too vague because it names no isthmus. Choice B describes a connection but does not identify an example. Choice D gives only the definition. The needed sentence directly names the Isthmus of Potidea as an example. The answer is C.
